news.t: Schwab Asset Management Announces Index and Fund Name Changes to Its Fundamental Index ETF and Mutual Fund Family

holdings.infoBox: FNDC is an equity ETF with a total of 1600 individual holdings. The top holdings are Msci Eafe Sep26 Ifus 20260918 stock at 0.82%, Ibiden at 0.68%, Daewoo Engineering & Construction at 0.52%, Tower Semiconductor at 0.43%, and Samsung Life Insurance at 0.41%.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental International Small Equity ETF (FNDC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a fundamentally-selected and -weighted index of small firms in developed ex-US markets based on adjusted sales, retained operational cash flow, and dividends/buybacks. FNDC was launched on Aug 15, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: RAFI Fundamental High Liquidity Developed ex US Small Index

data.title: Schwab Asset Management Announces Index and Fund Name Changes to Its Fundamental Index ETF and Mutual Fund Family
data.text: WESTLAKE, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Schwab Asset Management®, the asset management arm of The Charles Schwab Corporation, today announced index and fund name changes for the Schwab Fundamental Index* ET...
